SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class AllocationUncertaintyEstimator.UncertaintyResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.AllocationUncertaintyEstimator.UncertaintyResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AllocationUncertaintyEstimator
public static class AllocationUncertaintyEstimator.UncertaintyResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of an uncertainty-propagation run: per-source, per-custody, per-component variances of the allocated component flow plus aggregated totals.
See Also:

    Gets the variance of the allocated total molar flow from a source to a custody outlet, summed over independent component contributions.

      Source name to index lookup.

      private final Map<String,Integer> custodyIndex

  • Constructor Details

    • UncertaintyResult

      public UncertaintyResult(String[] sourceNames, String[] custodyNames, ProductType[] custodyTypes, String[] componentNames, double[] molarMass, double[][][] allocMoleVariance)
      Creates an uncertainty result.
      Parameters:
      sourceNames - source names; must be non-null and length S
      custodyNames - custody outlet names; must be non-null and length C
      custodyTypes - product types of each custody outlet; must be non-null and length C
      componentNames - component names; must be non-null and length K
      molarMass - component molar masses in kg/kmol; must be non-null and length K
      allocMoleVariance - per-source per-custody per-component allocated-flow variance in (mole/sec)^2; must be non-null and shape [S][C][K]

  • Method Details

    • getAllocatedFlowVariance

      public double getAllocatedFlowVariance(String source, String custody)
      Gets the variance of the allocated total molar flow from a source to a custody outlet, summed over independent component contributions.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must be a registered source
      custody - the custody outlet name; must be a registered outlet
      Returns:
      the variance in (mole/sec)^2

    • getAllocatedFlowStdDevMoles

      public double getAllocatedFlowStdDevMoles(String source, String custody)
      Gets the one-sigma standard deviation of the allocated total molar flow from a source to a custody outlet.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must be a registered source
      custody - the custody outlet name; must be a registered outlet
      Returns:
      the standard deviation in mole/sec

    • getAllocatedFlowStdDevKgPerHr

      public double getAllocatedFlowStdDevKgPerHr(String source, String custody)
      Gets the one-sigma standard deviation of the allocated total mass flow from a source to a custody outlet.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must be a registered source
      custody - the custody outlet name; must be a registered outlet
      Returns:
      the standard deviation in kg/hr

    • getAllocatedComponentFlowStdDevMoles

      public double getAllocatedComponentFlowStdDevMoles(String source, String custody, String component)
      Gets the one-sigma standard deviation of the allocated component flow from a source to a custody outlet.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must be a registered source
      custody - the custody outlet name; must be a registered outlet
      component - the component name; must be on the master slate
      Returns:
      the standard deviation in mole/sec

    • getProductAllocationStdDev

      public double getProductAllocationStdDev(String source, ProductType productType, String unit)
      Gets the one-sigma standard deviation of the total product allocation of a given type for a source, summed over all custody outlets of that product type.
      Parameters:
      source - the source name; must be a registered source
      productType - the product type (e.g. GAS, OIL, WATER)
      unit - either "mole/sec" or "kg/hr"
      Returns:
      the standard deviation in the requested unit

    • getSourceNames

      public String[] getSourceNames()
      Gets the source names.
      Returns:
      a copy of the source name array

    • getCustodyNames

      public String[] getCustodyNames()
      Gets the custody outlet names.
      Returns:
      a copy of the custody name array

    • getComponentNames

      public String[] getComponentNames()
      Gets the master component slate.
      Returns:
      a copy of the component name array

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns a schema-versioned JSON serialisation of the standard deviations.

      The JSON contains source, custody, and component lists plus a flat per-source per-custody matrix of standard deviations in mole/sec and kg/hr, and per-product totals.

      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON string

    • lookup

      private static int lookup(Map<String,Integer> map, String name, String label)
      Looks up the index of a name in a map and throws if missing.
      Parameters:
      map - the index map; must be non-null
      name - the name to find; must be non-null
      label - a label for the error message; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the zero-based index

    • componentIndexOf

      private int componentIndexOf(String component)
      Finds the master-slate index of a component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component name; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the zero-based component index

    • unitWeight

      private double unitWeight(int componentIndex, String unit)
      Returns the per-component weight to convert mole/sec into the requested unit.
      Parameters:
      componentIndex - zero-based component index
      unit - either "mole/sec" or "kg/hr"
      Returns:
      the multiplicative weight
